task_completion.description: Navigate to the Create Contact form in SuiteCRM
task_completion.visual_evidence: The SuiteCRM web interface is visible with the 'Create Contact' form or page open.

task_completion.description: Enter the contact's salutation, first name, and last name
task_completion.visual_evidence: The form fields for Salutation, First Name, and Last Name contain 'Mr.', 'Marcus', and 'Whitfield' respectively.

task_completion.description: Enter the contact's title, department, and account name
task_completion.visual_evidence: The form fields for Title, Department, and Account Name contain 'VP of Business Development', 'Sales', and 'Boeing Company' respectively.

task_completion.description: Enter the contact's office phone, mobile phone, and email address
task_completion.visual_evidence: The form fields for Office Phone, Mobile Phone, and Email contain '(703) 465-3580', '(703) 555-9201', and 'm.whitfield@boeing.com' respectively.
The Primary Address fields contain '929 Long Bridge Drive' (Street), 'Arlington' (City), 'VA' (State), '22202' (Postal Code), and 'USA' (Country).

task_completion.description: Enter the description and save the contact
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Description field contains the text starting with 'Primary contact for the defense systems division...', and the final screenshot shows the successfully saved contact record displaying the entered details.

integrity.description: The agent used the SuiteCRM web interface
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser interacting with the SuiteCRM GUI, not terminal commands, curl requests, or API scripts.

integrity.description: The agent did not use a text editor to fake the output
integrity.visual_evidence: The data is entered into the actual CRM form fields, not written in a text editor like Notepad, TextEdit, or gedit.

integrity.description: The agent genuinely interacted with the application
integrity.visual_evidence: Dropdowns, text fields, and buttons in the SuiteCRM interface show signs of active interaction (e.g., focus, selection, typing).

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected contact details to verify: First Name: 'Marcus', Last Name: 'Whitfield', Title: 'VP of Business Development', Account Name: 'Boeing Company', Email: 'm.whitfield@boeing.com', Office Phone: '(703) 465-3580'.
